app.name: EyesTalk
app.tagline: From a glance to a conversation

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.titleHint: Overview of what's happening at your venue right now
dashboard.activeUsersHint: People currently checked in at your venue
dashboard.totalCheckinsHint: Total number of check-ins since your venue was created
dashboard.activeActivitiesHint: Activities running right now — polls, games, challenges
dashboard.peakHoursHint: Times when your venue had the most visitors
dashboard.analyticsHint: Charts and trends for your venue's activity over time
dashboard.moderationHint: Review and resolve user reports and content issues
dashboard.activitiesHint: Create and manage polls, contests, quests, and challenges for your guests
dashboard.qrCodesHint: Generate and print QR codes to place around your venue for easy check-in
dashboard.qrEmptyHint: Generate a QR code and place it at your venue — guests scan to check in instantly
dashboard.settingsHint: Edit venue name, description, geofence, and more
dashboard.noVenue: You don't have a venue yet
dashboard.noVenueHint: Create your first venue to start seeing analytics and managing your space
dashboard.createFirst: Create your venue to get started
dashboard.liveScreenHint: Display real-time stats on a TV — perfect for the bar area
dashboard.reportsEmptyHint: All clear! Reports will appear here when users flag issues
dashboard.actTitleHint: Short name for the activity — visible to all guests in the venue
dashboard.actTypeHint: Choose what kind of activity it is: poll, contest, tournament, challenge, quest, or auction
dashboard.actDescriptionHint: Optional details — explain the rules, prizes, or what guests should do
dashboard.actStartsAtHint: When the activity begins — guests will see a countdown before it starts
dashboard.actEndsAtHint: When the activity automatically ends — results are locked after this
dashboard.actMaxParticipantsHint: Limit the number of people who can join — leave empty for unlimited
dashboard.actTokenCostHint: How many tokens a guest pays to participate — set 0 for free activities
dashboard.actStatusHint: Draft = hidden from guests, Active = visible and joinable, Completed/Cancelled = archived
dashboard.actDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{title}"? This action cannot be undone.
dashboard.announcementsHint: Send announcements to checked-in guests — they appear highlighted in the venue chat
dashboard.announcementPlaceholder: e.g. Happy hour! 2 cocktails for the price of 1 until 10pm
dashboard.noAnnouncementsHint: Send your first announcement to let guests know about specials, events, or promotions.
dashboard.loyaltyHint: See your most frequent visitors, create loyalty tiers, and reward regulars with tokens
dashboard.loyaltyTiersHint: Define tiers based on check-in count. Guests reaching a tier earn bonus tokens automatically.
dashboard.guestEngagementHint: How guests interact with your venue — messages, waves, and activities
dashboard.loyaltyOverviewHint: Distribution of guests by loyalty tier
dashboard.checkinMethodSplitHint: How guests check in — QR scan vs geolocation
dashboard.weekdayDistributionHint: Which days of the week are busiest
dashboard.noDataYetHint: Analytics will appear once guests start checking in and participating. Share your QR code to get started.

auth.venueOwnerHint: Manage your venue, create activities, and view analytics

venues.createVenueHint: Fill in the details below to register your venue on EyesTalk
venues.name: Venue Name
venues.nameHint: The name guests will see on the map
venues.typeHint: This helps users find your venue by category
venues.addressHint: Street address — helps guests navigate to your venue
venues.descriptionHint: Tell guests what makes your venue special
venues.geofenceHint: How close a guest needs to be to check in — usually 50-200m
venues.coordsHint: Exact location on the map — use Google Maps to find coordinates
venues.locationOnMapHint: Search for a place or click on the map to set the exact venue location. The dashed circle shows the check-in geofence.
venues.coordsRequired: Please select a location on the map
venues.deleteVenueConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this venue? All associated data (QR codes, checkins, activities) will be permanently removed.
venues.deleteVenueHint: Permanently delete this venue and all its data
